csrf_flow: Required GET /api/auth/csrf first then x-csrf-token header on POST /api/auth/login. Same as admin@example.com pattern — no regression.
side_finding: GET /api/users/me returns 500 (the :userId catch-all route hits the lookup with id='me' and the service throws). Not blocking — 'who am I' is correctly served by GET /api/auth/session — but the 500 should be a 404 or the controller should explicitly reject reserved keywords. Logged as side finding.
note: qa-admin seed worked. emailVerifiedAt is set, status=active, role=admin. SEED_ON_STARTUP=true on staging (qa-admin row was created 2026-05-20T10:02:27 which lines up with restage).
